subject: [PATCH v5 1/2] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and addresses the issue with premature disabling of exec readahead on arm64. However, it would be nice to have a test case for this scenario.

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch is a good solution to the problem, but it would be better if we could add some comments to explain why VM_EXEC readahead should not be subject to the mmap_miss heuristic.

2026-05-22.patch_summary: The patch proposes to bypass the mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead, which is a targeted readahead mechanism used for contpte mapping. The current implementation increments the mmap_miss counter on every page cache miss and decrements it when pages are successfully mapped via fault-around or found in cache with PG_readahead markers. However, this approach leads to premature disabling of exec readahead on arm64 due to the lack of decrement paths. The patch excludes VM_EXEC VMAs from the mmap_miss logic, similar to how VM_SEQ_READ is already excluded.
